database.label: DATABASE
database.description: Enterprise database infrastructure designed for reliability, security, and scale. SQL Server architecture, performance engineering, and high-availability design for organizations where data availability is non-negotiable.
database.detail: Always-On Availability Groups, automated failover, real-time monitoring, and security hardening — delivered across large enterprise and public-sector environments. A cross-divisional modernization program achieved 99.9% uptime and an 81% reduction in application vulnerabilities, placing the organization in the top 2% of Ontario public institutions for security posture.

appdev.label: APP DEV
appdev.description: Full-stack enterprise application development with a backend and middle-tier focus. .NET services, Python tooling, React frontends, and REST API design that integrates cleanly with your data platforms and infrastructure.
appdev.detail: Applications built to connect data platforms to the people and systems that depend on them — APIs, automation tooling, and web applications delivered across complex enterprise environments. Recent work includes AI-assisted data migrations and AI-integrated development workflows.

cloud.label: CLOUD
cloud.description: Azure infrastructure design and delivery for organizations modernizing beyond on-premises or managing hybrid environments. Database services, CI/CD pipelines, containerized workloads, and infrastructure-as-code.
cloud.detail: Certified Azure Database Administrator with hands-on delivery across Azure DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, and Bicep/ARM. Experienced in hybrid environments where cloud and on-premises systems need to operate as a coherent, well-governed whole.

data.label: DATA PLATFORM ENG.
data.description: Modern data platforms built on Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, and Power BI — from Lakehouse architecture and pipeline design through to semantic models, real-time analytics, and operational dashboards.
data.detail: Medallion Architecture implementation, real-time infrastructure monitoring with Fabric Eventhouse and KQL, and SSRS-to-Power BI migration including semantic model development and Git-integrated deployment pipelines. Public-sector delivery experience brings an added focus on data governance, auditability, and long-term maintainability.

architecture.label: ARCHITECTURE
architecture.description: System-level thinking that connects platforms, teams, and investments into a coherent whole. Integration design, API strategy, security governance, and technical roadmapping for organizations managing complex or evolving technology portfolios.
architecture.detail: Application modernization, vendor governance, and cross-platform integration design delivered across large enterprise and public-sector environments. One engagement repositioned an Ontario public institution into the top 2% provincially for security posture — the result of a structured, cross-divisional approach to risk assessment, remediation prioritization, and execution.
